title: IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Kanpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Kanpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Metallurgical Engineering from NITs or IITs
qualification.details: PhD in Metallurgical Engineering from NITs or IITs

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.iitk.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Senior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Metallurgical Engineering from a recognized institution like NITs or IITs to be eligible for the Senior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 57,000 per month, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Kanpur Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Senior Research Fellow recruitment at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/096. This number should be referenced when submitting your application.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Senior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIT Kanpur. Direct links are usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment articles.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as your photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates as specified in the official notification.
